summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Settings page feature. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Settings page has 3 sections: Profile (name/email/color), Change Password, and App Settings (admin-only duplicate detection toggle). Deployment config files verified.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - Update name successfully
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - Update color successfully
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - Reject duplicate email (400)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - Reject empty changes (400)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - Team member can update own profile
Backend: PUT /api/auth/password - Reject wrong current password (400)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/password - Reject short password <6 chars (400)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/password - Change password successfully and verify login
Backend: GET /api/settings - Returns duplicateDetectionEnabled
Backend: GET /api/settings - Team member can read settings
Backend: PUT /api/settings - Admin can toggle duplicate detection
Backend: PUT /api/settings - Team member gets 403 (forbidden)
Backend: GET /api/settings - Unauthenticated gets 401
Deployment: vercel.json exists with rewrites config
Deployment: railway.json exists with deploy config
Deployment: Procfile exists with uvicorn command
Deployment: main.py imports app from server
Frontend: Settings page loads at /settings with data-testid='settings-page'
Frontend: Profile section shows name, email, color picker
Frontend: Profile form populated with current user data
Frontend: Save Profile button shows 'No changes to save' toast when unchanged
Frontend: Profile name update works correctly
Frontend: Color picker selection works
Frontend: Change Password section with all 3 fields
Frontend: Password mismatch validation shows error toast
Frontend: App Settings section visible ONLY for admin users
Frontend: App Settings section correctly HIDDEN for team members
Frontend: Duplicate Detection toggle works (on/off)
Frontend: Role displayed correctly (Admin vs Team Member)
Frontend: All frontend files use REACT_APP_API_URL (not REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL)
Backend: MONGODB_URI with fallback to MONGO_URL implemented
test_credentials: Admin: admin@wedus.com / admin123, Team: priya@wedus.com / team123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings feature fully tested. Key endpoints: PUT /api/auth/profile (name, email, color), PUT /api/auth/password (currentPassword, newPassword), GET/PUT /api/settings (duplicateDetectionEnabled - admin only). Frontend data-testids: settings-page, settings-name-input, settings-email-input, save-profile-btn, settings-current-password, settings-new-password, settings-confirm-password, change-password-btn, duplicate-detection-toggle, color-{hex}. App Settings section uses isAdmin check to conditionally render.
